subcodes.first_line: Say: O concourse of princes and divines! Know with absolute certainty that ye cannot render God powerless [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قل یا معشر الامرآء و العلماء اعلموا بالحق الیقین انکم غیر معجزی الله انه
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @suffering and imprisonment, @call to action, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @thankfulness; gratitude, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
